title: Zorro Rides Again
writer: Barry Shipman, John Rathmell, Franklin Adreon
actors: John Carroll, Noah Beery, Richard Alexander
plot: The California-Yucatan Railroad, being built for the good of Mexico, is under siege by a gang of terrorists hoping to force its sale; no one can prove their connection to profiteer Marsden. Manuel Vega, aged co-owner, calls in the...
